## Description

Briefly describe the MCP server you're adding and why it's valuable.

**Server Name**: (e.g., mcp-server-example)
**GitHub URL**: (link to repository)
**Category**: (choose from README categories or propose new)

---

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Server repository exists and is accessible
- [ ] README has clear setup instructions
- [ ] Last commit within 6 months (active maintenance)
- [ ] Works with at least one MCP client (tested)
- [ ] No obvious security issues (no hardcoded secrets)
- [ ] Description is accurate and concise (<100 chars)
- [ ] Added entry to `data/servers.json` with all required fields
- [ ] README.md was updated (run `npm run generate-readme`)
- [ ] Validation passed (`npm run validate`)

---

## Additional Context

Add any notes about:
- Production use cases
- Performance characteristics
- Comparisons to similar servers
- Known limitations

## Screenshots (optional)

If applicable, add screenshots showing the server in action.
